summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Video Upload and Link Recording features. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified Upload Video button, Paste Link button, link form, recording display, and delete functionality for admin users. LessonEditor shows 'Upload Video' as a recording source option.

issues:
Console warning: '
cannot be a descendant of

' - Badge component nested inside

tag in resources section (line 1187). Minor HTML validation issue, does not affect functionality.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/upload requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/upload - admin can upload video file
Backend: POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/upload rejects invalid file extensions
Backend: POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/upload accepts all allowed extensions (mp4, mov, webm, avi, mkv)
Backend: POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/upload returns 404 for non-existent lesson
Backend: POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/link requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/link - admin can add recording link
Backend: POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/link rejects invalid URLs (non-http)
Backend: POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/link uses default title 'Zoom Recording'
Backend: GET /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/uploaded requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/uploaded returns list of recordings
Backend: GET /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/uploaded includes both upload and link types
Backend: GET /api/recordings/{recording_id}/stream requires token query param
Backend: GET /api/recordings/{recording_id}/stream rejects invalid token
Backend: GET /api/recordings/{recording_id}/stream works with valid token
Backend: GET /api/recordings/{recording_id}/stream returns 404 for non-existent recording
Backend: DELETE /api/recordings/uploaded/{recording_id} requires authentication
Backend: DELETE /api/recordings/uploaded/{recording_id} - admin can delete uploaded recording
Backend: DELETE /api/recordings/uploaded/{recording_id} - admin can delete linked recording
Backend: DELETE /api/recordings/uploaded/{recording_id} returns 404 for non-existent recording
Backend: Small files (< 125MB) are accepted for upload
Frontend: Login works with admin credentials
Frontend: Navigation to lesson page works
Frontend: NEXT tab shows 'Add Recording' section for admin
Frontend: Upload Video button visible and clickable
Frontend: Paste Link button visible and clickable
Frontend: Link form shows URL input, title input, and Add button
Frontend: Adding recording link works - shows success toast 'Recording link added!'
Frontend: Uploaded/linked recordings displayed in 'Session Recordings' section
Frontend: Delete button visible for admin on recordings
Frontend: LessonEditor shows 'Upload Video' as recording source option
Frontend: LessonEditor shows all 5 recording source options (In-App Recording, Upload Video, YouTube, External URL, None)
critical_code_review_comments: Video upload implementation correctly uses chunked reading (1MB chunks) to avoid memory spikes
File size limit (125MB) is enforced during upload with proper cleanup on failure
Stream endpoint uses JWT token via query param for <video src> tag compatibility
Uploaded recordings stored in /app/backend/uploads/videos/ with UUID filenames
MongoDB collection 'uploaded_recordings' stores both upload and link types
Frontend correctly shows upload controls only for teacher/admin (isTeacherOrAdmin check)
Upload progress bar implemented with onUploadProgress callback

Minor: Badge component nested inside

tag causes HTML validation warning (non-blocking)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video upload/link features fully tested and working. Upload endpoint at POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/upload accepts MP4, MOV, WebM, AVI, MKV up to 125MB. Link endpoint at POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings/link?url=...&title=... adds external recording links. Stream endpoint at GET /api/recordings/{recording_id}/stream?token={jwt} serves uploaded videos. Delete endpoint at DELETE /api/recordings/uploaded/{recording_id}. Frontend NEXT tab shows upload controls for admin/teacher only. LessonEditor has 'Upload Video' recording source option.

recording_link.validation: URL must start with http:// or https://

list_recordings.returns: Array of upload and link type recordings

stream_video.auth: JWT token in query param (for <video src> tags)

delete_recording.behavior: Deletes file (if upload) and database record

frontend_ui.next_tab: Shows 'Add Recording' section with Upload Video and Paste Link buttons
frontend_ui.link_form: URL input, title input, Add button
frontend_ui.recordings_display: Video player for uploads, Watch button for links

lesson_editor.upload_option_message: Upload a Zoom or other video recording from the lesson page's 'Watch Replay' tab. Supports MP4, MOV, WebM up to 125MB.
